Part.Source:
//LOG da Tabela Completa TIPOLANCAMENTO.
&LogErpRegCod1 = trim(Str(&LctCod)) &Tabela = 'TIPOLANCAMENTO'
if &LogErpRegTip = TrnMode.Delete //CASO FOR DELETE
For &SdtLogAtributosItem in &SdtLogAtributos prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, '', &LogErpRegGUID ) EndFor
Else //UPDATE E INSERT For Each Order EmpCod, LctCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where LctCod = &LctCod
For &SdtLogAtributosItem in &SdtLogAtributos Do Case Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctNom' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctNom) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctNatOpe' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctNatOpe) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctTip' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctTip) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctGerFin' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctGerFin) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctPagCom' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctPagCom) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctInfPrc' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctInfPrc) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctTipCus' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctTipCus) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctAtuFor' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctAtuFor) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctBasImpCod' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(toformattedString(LctBasImpCod)) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctRetCus' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctRetCus) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctPerCred' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctPerCred) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctAtuSal' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctAtuSal) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctAtuEst' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctAtuEst) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctAtuPro' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctAtuPro) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctGnre' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctGnre) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctCalMin' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctCalMin) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctEmsCot' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctEmsCot) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctDesFun' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctDesFun) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctUntArr' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(toformattedString(LctUntArr)) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctDesSen' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctDesSen) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctIncSen' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctIncSen) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctIncFun' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctIncFun) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctAtuGra' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctAtuGra) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctStsCod' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(toformattedString(LctStsCod)) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctObsPad' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctObsPad) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctTabColCod' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(toformattedString(LctTabColCod)) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctAtuEstFis' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctAtuEstFis) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctInfAnoSafCul' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctInfAnoSafCul) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctCrt' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctCrt) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctCha' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctCha) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctModPad' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctModPad) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctMovImo' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctMovImo) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctIcmsRet' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctIcmsRet) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'LctNfeIndPres' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(LctNfeIndPres) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID )
EndCase EndFor Exit EndFor Endif
parm(in:&LogErpRegTip, in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&LctCod, in:&ObjetoGeradorLog, in:&wwpContextUserName, in:&SdtLogAtributos);
